nodes.name: 04 | Code – Parse XML + Extract Last 24h Entries

values.content:
You are a B2B sales and marketing intelligence analyst. Analyze social/web posts and return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown and no preamble.

Determine if the post represents a business opportunity (someone looking for a tool, service, recommendation, or solution).

Return exactly this structure:
{
  "is_opportunity": true or false,
  "intent": "seeking_tool | seeking_service | complaint_about_competitor | general_discussion | news | irrelevant",
  "relevance_score": a number from 1 to 10,
  "pain_point": "brief description of problem they have, or null",
  "opportunity_summary": "one sentence on why this is or is not an opportunity",
  "suggested_action": "engage | monitor | ignore"
}

nodes.name: 07 | Code – Parse AI + Merge Post Data

parameters.content:
## 📡 Social Listening & Opportunity Alert

Pulls the last 24 hours of posts from an RSS feed every morning, uses AI to score each item for sales or growth opportunity, then routes engage worthy posts to Slack, logs everything in Notion, and ships a Daily Digest summary to the team.

**Perfect for:** Growth marketers, founders, and SDRs who want to spot buying signals and conversation starters across communities without scrolling feeds all day.

***

## How it works

1. **01 | Schedule · Daily at 9AM1** · Cron trigger that fires the workflow every morning at 9 AM.
2. **Edit Fields** · Sets the RSS feed URL and any static config values used downstream.
3. **03 | HTTP Request · Fetch RSS Feed1** · Downloads the raw RSS XML from the configured feed.
4. **04 | Code · Parse XML + Extract Last 24h Entries** · Parses the XML and filters to entries published in the last 24 hours.
5. **05 | Filter · Skip Empty Feed Results** · Stops the run if there are no fresh entries to process.
6. **06 | OpenAI · Analyze for Opportunity Signal** · Scores each post for relevance, intent, and engagement potential, returning a structured JSON verdict.
7. **07 | Code · Parse AI + Merge Post Data** · Merges the AI scores back onto the original post metadata.
8. **08 | Filter · High Relevance Opportunities Only** · Drops everything below the relevance threshold. *(branches to three paths)*
9. **10 | Filter · Engage Worthy Posts Only** · Narrows to posts where active engagement is the right move.
10. **11 | Slack · Alert Growth Team** · Posts each engage worthy item to the Growth channel with a one click reply button.
11. **Create a database page** · Logs every high relevance opportunity to a Notion database as a row of record. *(parallel branch)*
12. **12 | Aggregate · Collect All Opportunities** · Bundles every high relevance item from the run into a single list.
13. **13 | Code · Build Daily Digest Summary1** · Formats the bundle into a readable digest message.
14. **14 | Slack · Post Daily Digest1** · Posts the formatted digest to the team channel.

***

## Setup (~15 minutes)

1. **RSS Feed URL** · Set your target feed URL in the *Edit Fields* node. Any standard RSS or Atom feed works.
2. **OpenAI API** · Add your key in the *06 | OpenAI · Analyze for Opportunity Signal* node. The model decides the relevance and engagement scores, so tune the prompt to match your ICP.
3. **Slack OAuth** · Authorize the workspace and pick the alerts channel in *11 | Slack · Alert Growth Team* and the digest channel in *14 | Slack · Post Daily Digest1*.
4. **Notion** · Connect your Notion integration in *Create a database page* and point it at the database you want to log opportunities into. Match property names to the AI output schema.
5. **Schedule** · Confirm the *01 | Schedule · Daily at 9AM1* node fires at your team's local 9 AM and adjust the timezone if needed.

> Tune the relevance threshold in *08 | Filter · High Relevance Opportunities Only* to control alert volume. Run once manually with a real feed to check token cost before letting the daily schedule loose.

## 1️⃣ Fetch & Validate · Daily RSS Pull

Every morning **01 | Schedule · Daily at 9AM1** triggers the run and **Edit Fields** sets the target feed URL. **03 | HTTP Request · Fetch RSS Feed1** downloads the raw XML, **04 | Code · Parse XML + Extract Last 24h Entries** parses it and keeps only entries from the last 24 hours, and **05 | Filter · Skip Empty Feed Results** short circuits the workflow when there's nothing new to process.

## 2️⃣ AI Analysis · Opportunity Scoring

The **06 | OpenAI · Analyze for Opportunity Signal** node reads each fresh post and returns a structured JSON verdict scoring relevance, buying intent, and engagement potential against your ICP. The **07 | Code · Parse AI + Merge Post Data** node merges those scores back onto the original post payload so downstream filters and outputs have everything they need in one item.

## 3️⃣ Route & Output · Multi Channel Distribution

The **08 | Filter · High Relevance Opportunities Only** node drops low signal items and fans the survivors out to three parallel paths. **Create a database page** logs every relevant post to your Notion opportunities database. The **10 | Filter · Engage Worthy Posts Only** node narrows further and **11 | Slack · Alert Growth Team** posts each engage worthy item as a real time alert. In parallel, **12 | Aggregate · Collect All Opportunities** bundles the full batch which **13 | Code · Build Daily Digest Summary1** formats and **14 | Slack · Post Daily Digest1** ships as a rolled up team digest.
